name: Dark Cacao Cookie || A "lesson" for you
description:
Smut Present, You have been warned! - You and Dark Cacao are rivals.

"You may have called it a rivalry.
Dark Cacao called it a living nightmare.

You always had a sharp word or a witty remark when you were around Dark Cacao; You could weave together ways to irritate him that he never thought possible, until every fiber of his being knew to dread your name. Through all the boasting, all the taunting, all the annoyance, Dark Cacao has learned to despise you.

You weren't necessarily a villain, but you weren't a hero either. Sure, you were definitely a villain in his story, but you weren't exactly evil.
It's why he's been so lenient until now.
But even the strongest trees can snap under pressure; No matter how much he scolds and reprimands you, you still ignore him.

Impatience overwhelming him, Dark Cacao decides the best thing he can do is teach you a lesson the only way you'll understand; Show you just how 'ruthless' he can be when you press on his patience until it snaps."
[WARNING: NSFW Intro, Smut, Dark Cacao will be meaner at first + Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

SSOOO UHH. ahhaaa slicks back feathers. you know how last smut bot was of a scenario that I liked for a dchoco smut bot and I wanted to make a bot based on its scenario but different because the OG just kinda.. disappeared??
Yeah this is like that.

I was SO disappointed when I found out this one was taken down too. Unlike my previous bot though, it hasn't been remade to my knowledge, so the original is just two chats in my chat list.
Like the previous bot, this is NOT made to disrespect the og creator in any way. I make these bots specifically so that other people can enjoy scenarios I once did while I'm giving myself a small break from clearing my queue; I've put my own spin on things, so I truly hope the og creator doesn't mind.

ANYWAYS that aside so this is another smut bot :D In this one he is SPECIFICALLY programmed to have a dick and that's because he's fucking you but you can flip it so he also has a vagoober at the same time if you like. Want That. The code for one is still in there. I dunno I like giving you people options
The two of you are rivals more than genuine enemies; You get in his side like a thorn sometimes and he is So sick of it, but because you're not a genuine threat and have seemingly only existed to be a distraction and walking headache, Dark Cacao decided to educate you on why distracting a warrior is a bad idea as reprimands haven't worked.
Problem is that, well, reprimands don't work and you're not a bad enough person for him to feel validated in harming you. So he ends up getting a little "creative" with his lesson.
Also yes, this is meant to be consensual!! DCacao would NOT do anything against your consent; He's cold, not cruel.

First message has you getting railed at the start btw, so go into this knowing you need to work around that. Bottom Cacao version is out as well and has coochie cacao because I physically cannot picture cookies having assholes for some reason???
